title: Implement retry logic for external charge API
description: The external charge endpoint occasionally returns 503 errors under peak load. Implement exponential backoff retry with a maximum of 3 attempts before failing the transaction. See design doc in CONFLUENCE-203.

title: Refactor transaction log archiver to use bulk inserts
description: Current archiver inserts records one by one, causing high DB load during peak hours. Switch to batch inserts of 500 records. Reference PR #2398 for the previous attempt.

title: PaymentGateway timeout test failure
description: The test test_process_payment_timeout in test_payment_gateway.py fails consistently with AssertionError: expected status TIMEOUT but got PENDING. The mock socket appears to hang indefinitely rather than raising a socket.timeout after the configured 2.0-second window. This may be related to the timeout configuration not being propagated correctly in the PaymentGateway.__init__ method. Debugging notes are captured in NOTE-789; particularly the hypothesis about SocketConfig being overwritten by the default adapter. Needs a root-cause analysis and a fix plan.

title: Add rate limiting to payment notification webhook
description: Notify merchants via webhook when a payment is settled. Currently there is no rate limiting and a burst of settlements can overwhelm downstream systems. Implement a token-bucket limiter with configurable max 50 requests/second.

title: Fix currency conversion rounding error
description: Currency conversions using external API sometimes return off-by-one cent errors due to rounding mode. Switch from ROUND_HALF_UP to ROUND_HALF_EVEN to match banking standards. See issue #4120 for details.
